## Analyzers (4)

### Enrich observables with intelligence

#### [OpenCTI SearchObservables v2.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/OpenCTI)
Query multiple OpenCTI instances for a list of observables matching a pattern.

- **Author:** ANSSI
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `domain`, `ip`, `url`, `fqdn`, `uri_path`, `user-agent`, `hash`, `mail`, `mail_subject`, `registry`, `regexp`, `other`, `filename`, `mail-subject`

#### [OpenCTI v6 SearchObservables v2.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/OpenCTI)
Query multiple OpenCTI v6 instances for a list of observables matching a pattern.

- **Author:** ANSSI
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `domain`, `ip`, `url`, `fqdn`, `uri_path`, `user-agent`, `hash`, `mail`, `mail_subject`, `registry`, `regexp`, `other`, `filename`, `mail-subject`

#### [OpenCTI SearchExactObservable v2.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/OpenCTI)
Query multiple OpenCTI instances for a specific observable.

- **Author:** ANSSI
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `domain`, `ip`, `url`, `fqdn`, `uri_path`, `user-agent`, `hash`, `mail`, `mail_subject`, `registry`, `regexp`, `other`, `filename`, `mail-subject`

#### [OpenCTI v6 SearchExactObservable v2.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/OpenCTI)
Query multiple OpenCTI v6 instances for a specific observable.

- **Author:** ANSSI
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `domain`, `ip`, `url`, `fqdn`, `uri_path`, `user-agent`, `hash`, `mail`, `mail_subject`, `registry`, `regexp`, `other`, `filename`, `mail-subject`
